extraction.one_line_summary: DE GHENT Thomas won solo from a breakaway, holding 32 seconds at the finish after ALAPHILIPPE and PINOT attacked the final climb for time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE attacked final Cat-3 climb purely for 5-second time bonus to reclaim yellow jersey, prioritizing GC over stage win.
BORA-hansgrohe and MITCHELTON-SCOTT paced peloton to drop sprinters on mountainous stage, favoring climbing sprinters SAGAN and MATTHEWS.
ASTANA lifted pace 63km out when gap was 3:48, timing aggression unusually early for a hilly stage breakaway catch.
DE GHENT and DE MARCHI ditched breakaway companions midway through stage, calculating two committed riders outperforms larger cooperative group.

rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: DNS after hand fracture eliminates key EF domestique before mountain stages begin
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: dropped at back of peloton 15km out despite BORA pacing to shed other sprinters, unexpected weakness on hilly terrain
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: crashed 15km out grabbing front brake on right-hander, taking down INEOS riders with poor bike handling
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: bridged 15km solo full-gas to breakaway, showing exceptional diesel engine strength for future break selections
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: BAHRAIN led full sprint train at intermediate sprint 130km from finish but COLBRELLI finished 4th behind VIVIANI, poor positioning
